title: mirabilis jalapa var. procera
intro: Mirabilis jalapa var. procera, also known as tall four o'clock, is a perennial plant species in the Four O'Clock family, characterized by its tall stem and vibrant flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Mirabilis jalapa var. procera include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are commonly used to support immune function and overall well-being.
